title: Job Openings at Charlesmaris International Company
content:
Charlesmaris International company isa sales training, recruitment and buiness consulting company. Located in Surulere, Lagos.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Sales and Marketing Manager

Job Location: Ojodu-Berger, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Marketing Execution: Direct promotional activities, including digital, social media, and traditional marketing campaigns.
	Market Research: Analyze data and trends to identify new opportunities, target audiences, and competitive threats.
	Team Leadership: Recruit, train, and mentor staff, providing guidance to improve performance.
	Relationship Management
	Strategic Planning: Develop annual sales and marketing strategies, including pricing, advertising, and promotional plans to meet company goals.
	Sales Management: Drive sales, establish sales pipelines, and ensure teams meet quotas.


Salary
N170,000 - N200,000 per month.

Application Closing Date: 17th May, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

2.) Business Development Executive

Job Location: Obafemi-Owode, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities and Tasks


	Market Research & Analysis: Research prospective markets, industry trends, and competitor activities to identify new business opportunities.
	Sales & Negotiation: Present products or services, prepare proposals, negotiate contracts, and close deals to meet company revenue targets.
	Reporting & Collaboration: Prepare sales reports, track KPIs, and collaborate with marketing and product teams to align strategies.
	Lead Generation & Acquisition: Proactively identify and engage potential clients through networking, cold calling, and email outreach.
	Strategic Partnerships: Build and maintain long-term relationships with new and existing clients to foster partnerships.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications with 2-5 years of experience.
	Must have experience in the Interior industry.


Application Closing Date: 14th May, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.



3.) Sales Executive

Job Location: Obafemi-Owode, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Core Responsibilities and Duties


	Relationship Management: Building and maintaining long-term relationships with clients to ensure satisfaction and repeat business.
	Target Achievement: Working towards and exceeding monthly or annual sales targets and key performance indicators (KPIs).
	Market Analysis: Monitoring competitor activity, industry trends, and providing feedback to the marketing team.
	Record Keeping: Maintaining accurate records of sales activities, customer interactions, and pipeline data, usually within a CRM system.
	After-Sales Support: Following up with clients to ensure satisfaction, address issues, and resolve complaints.
	Prospecting & Lead Generation: Identifying potential customers through networking, research, and cold calling/emailing.
	Sales Presentations & Demonstrations: Presenting, promoting, and selling products/services to new and existing customers.
	Negotiation & Closing: Negotiating contract terms, pricing, and delivery schedules to close sales deals.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess relevant qualifications and experience.


Salary
N130,000 - N200,000 per month.

Application Closing Date: 14th May, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

     

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "MOL Integrated Service, a Tech Company that is into phone Accessories, is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media &amp; Content Marketing Specialist

Job Location: Ikeja, Dopemu, GRA, Abule-Egba &amp; Ojota, Lagos
Employment Type: Contract

Job Requirements


	Strong knowledge of social media platforms, trends, and website management.
	Experience with content management systems (e.g., WordPress, Shopify).
	Excellent content creation skills (graphic design/video editing is a must).
	Basic SEO knowledge and familiarity with tools like Google Analytics.
	Exceptional communication and interpersonal skills.
	Experience working with influencers.
	Willing to feature in brand content is a plus.
	Expertise in social media advertising platforms (Facebook Ads, Google Ads, etc.)
	Strong Analytical skills and management tools (e.g., Google Analytics, SEMrush).
	Proven track record of running successful paid social campaigns.
	Excellent project management and organizational skills.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: humanresources.mol@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Social Media & Content Marketing Specialist Job at MOL Integrated Service




        
    

        
        MOL Integrated Service, a Tech Company that is into phone Accessories, is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media & Content Marketing Specialist

Job Location: Ikeja, Dopemu, GRA, Abule-Egba & Ojota, Lagos
Employment Type: Contract

Job Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Strong knowledge of social media platforms, trends, and website management.
	Experience with content management systems (e.g., WordPress, Shopify).
	Excellent content creation skills (graphic design/video editing is a must).
	Basic SEO knowledge and familiarity with tools like Google Analytics.
	Exceptional communication and interpersonal skills.
	Experience working with influencers.
	Willing to feature in brand content is a plus.
	Expertise in social media advertising platforms (Facebook Ads, Google Ads, etc.)
	Strong Analytical skills and management tools (e.g., Google Analytics, SEMrush).
	Proven track record of running successful paid social campaigns.
	Excellent project management and organizational skills.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "VIJU Industries Nigeria Limited is a leading player in Nigeria&rsquo;s food and beverage sector, recognized for its dedication to quality, innovation, and consumer satisfaction. Since its establishment, the company has built a strong reputation by producing nutritious and affordable products that have become household staples across the country. Its flagship offerings include Viju Milk Drink, Viju BB Star, and a wide variety of flavored yoghurts, fruit milk drinks, and refreshing beverages. The company also produces Mr. V Premium Water and V-Cool Soft Drinks, ensuring a diverse portfolio that caters to different tastes and age groups. Each product is crafted to meet international standards while remaining accessible to Nigerian families. Guided by values of innovation, quality assurance, accessibility, and sustainability, VIJU Industries continues to expand its product lines and distribution network. Its commitment to excellence has made it a trusted brand not only in Nigeria but also across West Africa. More than a manufacturer, VIJU Industries is a symbol of nourishment and reliability, enriching lives with products that inspire joy, promote well-being, and reflect the company&rsquo;s vision of making nutrition enjoyable and affordable for all.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Employment Type: Full-time

	Able to independently manage the entire bottled water production line and organize production according to established production and quality standards.


Salary
N100,000 - N300,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: vijutalent@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Production Manager Job at VIJU Industries Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    

VIJU Industries Nigeria Limited is a leading player in Nigeria’s food and beverage sector, recognized for its dedication to quality, innovation, and consumer satisfaction. Since its establishment, the company has built a strong reputation by producing nutritious and affordable products that have become household staples across the country. Its flagship offerings include Viju Milk Drink, Viju BB Star, and a wide variety of flavored yoghurts, fruit milk drinks, and refreshing beverages. The company also produces Mr. V Premium Water and V-Cool Soft Drinks, ensuring a diverse portfolio that caters to different tastes and age groups. Each product is crafted to meet international standards while remaining accessible to Nigerian families. Guided by values of innovation, quality assurance, accessibility, and sustainability, VIJU Industries continues to expand its product lines and distribution network. Its commitment to excellence has made it a trusted brand not only in Nigeria but also across West Africa. More than a manufacturer, VIJU Industries is a symbol of nourishment and reliability, enriching lives with products that inspire joy, promote well-being, and reflect the company’s vision of making nutrition enjoyable and affordable for all.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Production Manager
Job Location: Kwali, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Familiar with bottled water and CSD (carbonated soft drink) production processes and manufacturing workflows.
	Able to independently manage the entire bottled water production line and organize production according to established production and quality standards.


Salary
N100,000 - N300,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

Safety / Security Manager Job at VIJU Industries Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        VIJU Industries Nigeria Limited is a leading player in Nigeria’s food and beverage sector, recognized for its dedication to quality, innovation, and consumer satisfaction. Since its establishment, the company has built a strong reputation by producing nutritious and affordable products that have become household staples across the country.

Its flagship offerings include Viju Milk Drink, Viju BB Star, and a wide variety of flavored yoghurts, fruit milk drinks, and refreshing beverages. The company also produces Mr. V Premium Water and V-Cool Soft Drinks, ensuring a diverse portfolio that caters to different tastes and age groups. Each product is crafted to meet international standards while remaining accessible to Nigerian families.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Guided by values of innovation, quality assurance, accessibility, and sustainability, VIJU Industries continues to expand its product lines and distribution network. Its commitment to excellence has made it a trusted brand not only in Nigeria but also across West Africa. More than a manufacturer, VIJU Industries is a symbol of nourishment and reliability, enriching lives with products that inspire joy, promote well-being, and reflect the company’s vision of making nutrition enjoyable and affordable for all.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Safety / Security Manager

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	A Safety & Security Manager ensures compliance with health, safety, and environmental standards while protecting staff, facilities, and assets.
	They develop and enforce safety policies, conduct risk assessments, and oversee emergency response plans tailored to manufacturing operations.
	Security responsibilities include managing access control, supervising guards, and coordinating with law enforcement.


Requirements


	A relevant Degree, certifications, and experience in manufacturing safety are typically required.
	The role requires investigating incidents, maintaining records, and recommending corrective actions.
	Strong leadership, communication, and problem-solving skills are essential, along with knowledge of occupational safety, industrial hygiene, and security systems.


Salary
N100,000 - N300,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Application to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

The vision expanded in 2015 when the Directors decided to adopt a Group structure and focus on the following sectors which are critical to the attainment of man&#39;s physiological and safety needs. Our business outlook currently covers Africa and Europe through our subsidiaries; Fusion Facilities Management Limited (PTY) in South Africa, Fusion Group Management Limited in UAE (Dubai) and Fusion Group Management Limited in UK.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Officer

Job Location: Onikan, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	A graduate of Accounting is needed to support the Head of account department.
	The job location is at Onikan and intrested applicants should reside on the Island


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: recruitmentfusiongroup@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Account Officer Job at Fusion Facilities




        
    

        
        Fusion Facilities commenced operations in 2013 as a business focusing on integrated management services. The vision expanded in 2015 when the Directors decided to adopt a Group structure and focus on the following sectors which are critical to the attainment of man's physiological and safety needs. Our business outlook currently covers Africa and Europe through our subsidiaries; Fusion Facilities Management Limited (PTY) in South Africa, Fusion Group Management Limited in UAE (Dubai) and Fusion Group Management Limited in UK.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Officer

Job Location: Onikan, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	A graduate of Accounting is needed to support the Head of account department.
	The job location is at Onikan and intrested applicants should reside on the Island


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
